description: Overstory sling failed with 'can't find pane' because Codex exited immediately on unsupported model aliases (haiku/sonnet/opus).
resolution: Set all agent models in .overstory/agent-manifest.json to gpt-5.3-codex and keep .overstory/config.yaml top-level models: empty for Overstory v0.7.9.

content: Start a tmux server before ov sling using 'tmux new-session -d -s ov-bootstrap bash' to prevent tmux transport failures.

name: textual-main-thread-updates
description: When worker threads need to update Textual UI state, route updates through app.call_from_thread(...) to avoid thread-safety crashes.

name: tui-v3-feedback-channel
description: Use app.notify() as the unified TUI v3 toast/snackbar path for operation feedback.

name: nostr-relay-mutation
description: Prefer dedicated nostr service adapters for relay add/remove operations rather than direct ConfigService list edits.

name: pytest-src-layout
description: Run tests from expected src context or set PYTHONPATH explicitly to avoid stale site-packages shadowing local code during debugging.

name: overstory-runbook
description: Operational swarm note with known-good commands lives at OVERSTORY_SWARM_TUTORIAL.md.

title: Codex runtime model source
rationale: In this environment Overstory v0.7.9 rejects bare gpt-* in config models:, while codex account mode rejects provider-prefixed openai/gpt-* names; the stable path is model mapping in agent-manifest.json.

content: SeedPass swarm baseline targets canonical branch beta and quality gates should run with .venv/bin prepended to PATH for pytest -q and scripts/run_ci_tests.sh.

name: tui-v3-grid-focus-and-query-state
description: TUI v3 main grid keyboard scrolling depends on explicit focus ownership: focus #entry-data-table on MainScreen mount and restore focus there when closing the command palette. Persist active search query in app state so refresh/filter/sort changes do not silently clear results.

name: tui-v3-maintenance-css-conventions
description: Maintenance screens share MAINTENANCE_CSS from maintenance.py. Use CSS (not DEFAULT_CSS) on Screen subclasses. Intro cards use round border style. Danger buttons use background #880000 / border #ff4444.
